name: Ravi Kumar
bio: A passionate farmer with over 20 years of experience in dryland farming. Ravi has been transforming traditional farming with low-cost solar technology and sustainable methods that have helped his entire village.

name: Suresh Reddy
bio: Water conservation expert who pioneered drip irrigation techniques suitable for small farms with minimal investment. His systems have been replicated across 200+ farms in Andhra Pradesh.

name: Mahesh Patel
bio: Tool innovation specialist who has designed several multi-purpose farming tools that reduce labor costs by up to 60%. A local blacksmith turned farmer-engineer.

name: Lakshmi Devi
bio: Champion of women-led agricultural innovation. Lakshmi focuses on water management solutions and has helped 150+ families in the Mandya district access clean irrigation water.

name: Ramesh Yadav
bio: Grain processing innovator who developed low-cost equipment to help small farmers reduce post-harvest losses. His grain cleaning machine is now used in 12 villages.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Organic farming advocate and agri-entrepreneur who pioneered natural pest control methods using locally grown herbs. Her techniques have eliminated chemical pesticide use on over 300 acres across Nashik district.

name: Arjun Singh
bio: Veteran wheat and rice farmer who developed low-cost straw management techniques. Arjun's field burning alternatives have improved air quality and added ₹12,000 per acre in extra income through biochar production.

name: Meena Kumari
bio: Desert farming specialist who developed water-harvesting earthworks (tanka) that collect rainwater in arid regions. Her techniques have brought irrigation to 80+ dry-land farms in the Thar Desert belt.

name: Gopal Nair
bio: Coconut and spice farmer who integrated duck-fish-rice polyculture systems on small wetland plots. His integrated farming model generates four income streams simultaneously and has been adopted by 60 families in Thrissur.

name: Savitri Devi
bio: Lychee orchardist and self-taught plant breeder who developed frost-resistant seedling nurseries using low-cost polythene tunnels. Her nursery supplies saplings to 400+ farmers annually at a fraction of commercial nursery prices.
